title: An instant messaging system
abstract: The present invention relates to an instant messaging system (1) for enabling parties to be able to share contents which are generated between one another by themselves or presented to them ready, comprise a related text reflecting certain emotions and issues added onto an image, and commonly known under the name of "caps".
claims:
Claims A system (1) for enabling parties to be able to share contents which are generated between one another by themselves or presented to them ready, comprise a related text reflecting certain emotions and issues added onto an image, and commonly known under the name of "caps" comprising: at least one transmitter mobile device (2) which is used by the user who wants to send message; at least one receiver mobile device (3) which is used by the user who receives the message sent from the transmitter mobile device (2); and characterized by at least one instant messaging application (4) which runs on the transmitter mobile device (2) and the receiver mobile device (3) and enables the sender and the receiver to message with each other instantly over texts, emojis, stickers and caps; at least one instant messaging server (5) which is in communication with the instant messaging applications (4) and the external resources (OS) that run on the transmitter mobile device (2) and the receiver mobile device (3), receives the newly-generated caps by connecting to the external resources (OS) periodically and enables these caps received to be demonstrated to the users over the instant messaging applications (4) that run on the transmitter mobile device (2) and the receiver mobile device (3); at least one database (6) which is in communication with the instant messaging server (5) and enables the caps received by the instant messaging server (5) to be recorded. A system (1) according to Claim 1, characterized by the transmitter mobile device (2) which is used by the user who wants to send message; is essentially an electronic device such as smart phone, tablet computer that 

 can run at least one application on itself; and which has at least one screen that enables to indicate the menu of the instant messaging application (4) and at least one input unit such as touch screen or keypad that enables to make choice from the menu of the instant messaging application (4). 3. A system (1) according to Claim 1, characterized by the transmitter mobile device (2) which is used by the user who receives the message sent from the transmitter mobile device (2); is essentially an electronic device such as smart phone, tablet computer that can run at least one application on itself; and which has at least one screen that enables to indicate the menu of the instant messaging application (4) and at least one input unit such as touch screen or keypad that enables to make choice from the menu of the instant messaging application (4). 4. A system (1) according to Claim 1, characterized by the instant messaging application (4) which runs on the transmitter mobile device (2) and the receiver mobile device (3) and enables the sender and the receiver to message with each other instantly via texts, emojis, stickers and caps over the transmitter mobile device (2) and the receiver mobile device (3). 5. A system (1) according to Claim 1, characterized by the instant messaging application (4) which provides a menu to the users from the transmitter mobile device (2) and the receiver mobile device (3) screen during operation and enables the said users to message with each other instantly depending on the choice made with the input units of the transmitter mobile device (2) and the receiver mobile device (3). 6. A system (1) according to Claim 1, characterized by the instant messaging application (4) which transmits the instant message - that is sent from the transmitter mobile device (2) - to the receiver mobile device (3) over an Internet network. 7. A system ( 1) according to Claim 1, characterized by the instant messaging server (5) which is in communication with the instant messaging applications (4) and the external resources (OS). 8. A system (1) according to Claim 1, characterized by the instant messaging server (5) which queries whether there are newly-generated caps in the said resources by connecting to the external resources (OS) periodically. 9. A system (1) according to Claim 8, characterized by the instant messaging server (5) which extracts these caps from the external resources (OS) and records them in the database (6), if it determines that there are new caps in the said external resources (OS) as a result of the inquiry. 10. A system (1) according to Claim 8, characterized by the instant messaging server (5) which ensures that the up-to-date caps recorded in the database (6) are demonstrated to the users over the screens of the transmitter mobile device (2) and the receiver mobile device (3) by means of the instant messaging application (4) in order that they can be used for messaging between users. 11. A system (1) according to Claim 1, characterized by the instant messaging server (5) which connects to the external resources (OS) periodically and queries whether there are new visual contents such as newly-generated emoji or sticker in the said resources. 12. A system (1) according to Claim 1 1, characterized by the instant messaging server (5) which extracts the said contents from the external resources (OS) and records them in the database (6), if it determines that 

 there are new visual contents in the said external resources (OS) as a result of the inquiry. 13. A system (1) according to Claim 12, characterized by the instant messaging server (5) which ensures that the visual contents recorded in the database (6) are demonstrated to the users over the screens of the transmitter mobile device (2) and the receiver mobile device (3) by means of the instant messaging application (4) in order that they can be used for messaging between users. 14. A system (1) according to Claim 1, characterized by the database (6) which is in communication with the instant messaging server (5) and wherein the caps received by the instant messaging server (5) from the external resources (OS) to be recorded. 15. A system (1) according to Claim 1, characterized by the instant messaging application (4) which enables the users to message with each other by using the caps generated by themselves. 16. A system (1) according to Claim 15, characterized by the instant messaging application (4) which enables the users to send the caps generated by themselves to the instant messaging server (5). 17. A system (1) according to Claim 16, characterized by the instant messaging server (5) which records the user caps received over the instant messaging application (4) depending on a user identity generated inside the database. 18. A system (1) according to Claim 17, characterized by the instant messaging server (5) which ensures that the caps - that are kept as recorded inside the database (6) depending on the user identity while the Î  

 instant messaging application (4) is in operating state - to be provided to the user over the instant messaging application (4) matching with the user identity. 19. A system (1) according to Claim 17, characterized by the instant messaging server (5) which ensures that the user caps generated by the user depending on the user approval and recorded in the database (6) upon being received by means of the instant messaging application (4) are provided to all users having the instant messaging application (4) in order that they can be used in messaging between the users. 20. A system (1) according to Claim 19, characterized by the instant messaging application (4) which enables the users to like or vote user caps. 21. A system (1) according to Claim 20, characterized by the instant messaging application (4) which sends the user likes or votes to the instant messaging server (5). 22. A system (1) according to Claim 21, characterized by the instant messaging server (5) which scores the caps by evaluating the user likes and votes received from the instant messaging application (4) by means of the pre-determined weights and records the calculated scores of the caps kept in the database (6) regarding to the caps. 23. A system (1) according to Claim 22, characterized by the instant messaging server (5) which enables to provide the caps, that has the maximum score in the predetermined number, in a different window on the instant messaging application (4). 24. A system (1) according to Claim 1 , characterized by the instant messaging server (5) which determines the sorting condition of the caps provided to the users by means of the instant messaging application (4). 25. A system (1) according to Claim 24, characterized by the instant messaging server (5) which ensures that the caps are provided to the user over the instant messaging application (4) depending on the use count of the user of the instant messaging application (4). 26. A system (1) according to Claim 24, characterized by the instant messaging server (5) which ensures that the caps are provided to the users over the instant messaging application (4) depending on the use count of all users using the instant messaging application (4). 27. A system (1) according to Claim 24, characterized by the instant messaging server (5) which ensures that the caps are provided to the users over the instant messaging application (4) such that they will be from new ones to old ones according to the date of record in the database (6).
